articles.title: Trump Accounts: Will the new savings scheme for American children succeed? - BBC
articles.description: The White House has hailed the project as giving new generations a stake in the American dream, but the scheme has its critics.
articles.content: However, Andy Blocker, head of policy, regulatory and government relations at financial services firm Edward Jones, believes the $1,000 contribution for babies born during Trump's second term in offi… [+58 chars]
